mapper.select: SELECT * FROM tb_rad_accident WHERE deleted = 0 ORDER BY accident_date DESC, id DESC
SELECT * FROM tb_rad_accident WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_rad_accident WHERE deleted = 0
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_rad_accident WHERE deleted = 0 AND status = #{status}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_rad_accident WHERE deleted = 0 AND YEAR(accident_date) = YEAR(GETDATE())
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_rad_accident (accident_date, accident_type, location, cause, response, nrsc_reported, reported_at, status, note, deleted, created_at, modified_at) VALUES ( #{accidentDate,jdbcType=DATE}, #{accidentType}, #{location}, #{cause}, #{response}, #{nrscReported}0, #{reportedAt}, #{status}'조사중', #{note}, 0, GETDATE(), GETDATE())
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_rad_accident SET accident_date = #{accidentDate,jdbcType=DATE}, accident_type = #{accidentType}, location = #{location}, cause = #{cause}, response = #{response}, nrsc_reported = #{nrscReported}0, reported_at = #{reportedAt}, status = #{status}, note = #{note}, modified_at = GETDATE() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE tb_rad_accident SET deleted = 1, modified_at = GETDATE() WHERE id = #{id}
